subcodes.first_line: O people of Sisan! Upon you be the glory of the All-Merciful. Ye have ever been remembered and still are. Beware lest ye be hindered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل سیسان علیکم بهاء الرحمن لازال مذکور بوده و هستید ایاکم ان تمنعکم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action
